\[
\Pi(\lambda,y)=\lambda^{4}-\lambda^{3}-(2y+1)\lambda^{2}+\lambda+y(y+1),\qquad h(\lambda,y)=4\lambda\bigl(y-\lambda^{2}+\tfrac12\bigr)+3\lambda^{2}-1.
\]
\[
\mathrm{Res}_{\lambda}\bigl(\Pi(\lambda,y),h(\lambda,y)\bigr)=-y(y-1)P_{\mathrm{LY}}(y).
\]
